About Me

QA Engineer Specializing in Automation & AI Systems

Quality is not only about finding defects. It is about validating business requirements, protecting user trust, ensuring data integrity, and verifying that both traditional software and AI systems behave reliably.

I am a Software Quality Assurance Engineer with 4+ years of experience specializing in **Playwright & TypeScript automation**, Generative AI/RAG validation, and database integrity testing. I construct robust CI/CD regression suites and design comprehensive manual functional specifications for complex platforms.

My core expertise lies in developing maintainable **Page Object Model (POM) frameworks** in Playwright and Selenium. Recently, I have focused on **AI Quality Assurance**—triaging vector databases, checking document retrieval accuracy, auditing prompt parameters, and validating tool-calling routes in agentic workflows.

4+ Years QA Experience
50+ Test Suites Run
100% Target Coverage

Currently Learning

  • Advanced Playwright Orchestration
  • AI Testing & Observability Frameworks
  • RAG Evaluation Metrics (Ragas, TruLens)
  • Agent Routing & Memory Validation
  • Model Context Protocol (MCP)
  • Multi-Agent Orchestration with LangGraph

Skill Matrix

Core Competencies

Playwright (TS)

Automating fast UI regressions, API chains, cross-browser scenarios, and custom HTML reports.

Selenium WebDriver

Building Java Page Object Models, TestNG execution rigs, and Maven XML configs.

Git & CI/CD

Managing code reviews in GitHub and configuring automated test runners in Jenkins pipelines.

Prompt Engineering

Designing adversarial system messages to test model jailbreaks and validate prompt constraints.

Hallucination Audits

Evaluating LLM responses for groundedness, accuracy, and logic inconsistencies.

RAG Verification

Verifying document chunks, embeddings, retrieval precision, and source citation accuracy.

Agentic AI Testing

Verifying autonomous tool execution, sub-agent communications, short-term memory, and retry loops.

REST API Validation

Asserting HTTP codes, JSON structures, body fields, and header validations via Postman.

Auth & Security Checks

Validating Bearer tokens, OAuth sequences, and error codes for unauthorized requests.

Database Integrity

Writing SQL checks on MySQL, PostgreSQL, and MS SQL Server to verify backend CRUD consistency.

Functional Testing

Validating UI elements, logic flows, and user journeys against product specs.

Regression Testing

Ensuring new commits do not break existing modules or database behaviors.

Smoke & Sanity

Running baseline checks on build releases to ensure environmental stability.

Integration & System

Testing end-to-end data pipelines connecting APIs, queues, and DB records.

UAT & Exploratory

Mimicking realistic customer workloads and edge-cases without scripted boundaries.

Defect Management

Triaging defects, compiling step-to-reproduce logs, and reporting via Jira.

Specialized Validation

AI & RAG Quality Engineering

RAG Pipeline Validation

We validate each step of the retrieval-augmented generation workflow to ensure answers remain grounded and contextually accurate:

1 Document Chunks: Verify token lengths and embedding overlap parameters.
2 Vector Database: Audit indexing efficiency in ChromaDB, Pinecone, or FAISS.
3 Retrieval Accuracy: Check top-k results for relevance, density, and duplication.
4 LLM Grounding: Run verification checks to identify and block hallucinations.

Agentic Workflow Testing

Testing autonomous agents running on CrewAI or LangGraph requires verifying decision logic and external system connectivity:

A Tool Invocation: Verify the agent selects correct tools for given payloads.
B Agent Routing: Assert transition conditions in multi-agent routing graphs.
C Memory Retention: Validate context updates across multi-turn sessions.
D Exception Paths: Audit recovery behaviors when tool calls fail or timeout.
Works

Featured Projects

Playwright / TS / LLMs
LLM & E2E Automation

AI Chatbot Testing & Playwright Automation Rig

Built an automated Playwright testing framework to audit LLM chatbot UI interactions. Verified prompt compliance, multi-turn context retention, and flagged hallucinations.

RAG Auditing

RAG Pipeline Validation Framework

Designed automated assertion pipelines validating the data cycle: Document ingestion → Embedding generation → Vector Search (ChromaDB) → Contextual Retrieval → Response Groundedness.

Vector DB Retrieval Rate Citations ChromaDB
Agent Validation

Agentic AI Workflow Testing

Created robust validation workflows for CrewAI and LangGraph multi-agent setups. Verified correct tool calling parameters, agent transitions, and exception recovery loops.

Tool Calls Routing Graph Exceptions LangGraph

ERP & Inventory Management System

Framework Architecture

Automation Structure

Playwright Page Object Model

I construct highly resilient UI and API automated test setups in TypeScript. By isolating page locators from specs, the code stays maintainable across layout shifts:

Configuration: Multi-browser configurations (Chromium, Firefox, WebKit) and environment flags.
Fixture Isolation: Custom page fixtures managing auth login state cookies.
Reports: HTML reporting integrated directly into GitHub Actions pipelines.
auth-validation.spec.ts 
import { test, expect } from '@playwright/test';
import { LoginPage } from '../pages/LoginPage';
import { DashboardPage } from '../pages/DashboardPage';

test.describe('ERP Authentication Tests', () => {
  test('Success login sets session state', async ({ page }) => {
    const login = new LoginPage(page);
    const dashboard = new DashboardPage(page);

    await login.navigate();
    await login.performLogin('qa_user', 'secure_pass');
    
    await expect(page).toHaveURL(/.*\/dashboard/);
    await expect(dashboard.sidebarLogo).toBeVisible();
  });
});
Interactive Demos

AI Testing Lab

AI001

Hallucinated Product Information

FAILED

Generated response contains inventory values not present in retrieved knowledge base document chunks.

Expected: "Stock levels for SKU-402: 12 units available."
Actual: "We currently have 125 units of SKU-402 in storage." (Hallucination)
AI002

Incorrect Source Citation

FAILED

LLM cited `transit_policy_v2.pdf` instead of the correct `warehouse_procedures_v1.pdf` for cross-dock rules.

Expected: Citation references `warehouse_procedures_v1.pdf#page=4`
Actual: Citation lists `transit_policy_v2.pdf`
AI003

Context Loss in Multi-Turn

FAILED

Agent fails to recall user's selected warehouse location after three conversation exchanges.

User: "Now update its transfer status."
Actual Agent: "Which item or warehouse location are you referring to?"
AI004

Incorrect Tool Invocation

FAILED

Router graph invokes the DB writing tool instead of the read-only fetch tool during a stock check query.

Expected Tool: `query_database`
Actual Tool Called: `update_inventory_db` (Side effect triggered)
AI-TC-001

Validate Response Source Grounding

PASS
Scenario: Submit user query demanding facts on stock transfers from uploaded PDF.
Expected Result: Response generated solely from doc context with strict reference markers. No external training knowledge used.
AI-TC-002

Out-of-Scope Graceful Failure

PASS
Scenario: Ask system a query outside the uploaded knowledge base context.
Expected Result: System fails gracefully, stating: "I am unable to answer based on the uploaded data." No hallucinations.
